sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34228" key="e)mparaskeua/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐμπαρα-σκευάζω</orth>, <sense id="n34228.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to prepare</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φόβον τοῖς ἀνδράσι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Clin.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.1.76</biblScope></bibl>, cf.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:9:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aen.Tact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
